GetFilePaths(string)

检索并返回指定路径下所有文件路径。 Retrieves and returns all file paths under the specified path.

public static Array<string> GetFilePaths(string path)

Parameters

path string

Returns

Array<string>

GetOrAddNode<T>(Node)

获取并返回父节点下指定类型的子节点；若不存在，则添加并返回一个新节点。 Gets and returns the child node of the specified type under the given parent. If it does not exist, adds and returns a new child node.

public static T GetOrAddNode<T>(Node parent) where T : Node, new()

Parameters

parent Node

Returns

T

Type Parameters

T

GetOrAddNode<T>(Node, string) 

public static T GetOrAddNode<T>(Node parent, string name) where T : Node, new()

Parameters

parent Node
name string

Returns

T

Type Parameters

T

GroupPathsByRegex(Array<string>, string)

Groups the given paths by the first capture group of the provided regex pattern.

public static Dictionary<string, Array<string>> GroupPathsByRegex(Array<string> paths, string pattern)

Parameters

paths Array<string>

An array of paths to group.

pattern string

A regex pattern with at least one capture group.

Returns

Dictionary<string, Array<string>>

A dictionary mapping each capture group value to a list of matching paths.

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown when paths is null.

ArgumentException

Thrown when pattern is null or empty.

GroupPathsByRegex(ref Array<string>, Dictionary<string, Array<string>>)

Uses regex patterns to group matching paths into a dictionary by keyword. Matched paths are removed from the input list.

public static Dictionary<string, Array<string>> GroupPathsByRegex(ref Array<string> paths, Dictionary<string, Array<string>> patternMap)

Parameters

paths Array<string>
patternMap Dictionary<string, Array<string>>

Returns

Dictionary<string, Array<string>>

IsInherited(GDScript, string) 

public static bool IsInherited(GDScript targetScript, string baseScript)

Parameters

targetScript GDScript
baseScript string

Returns

bool

ValidateInheritance(GDScript, GDScript)

Validates that the specified script either directly or indirectly inherits from the given base script or any of its ancestor classes in the inheritance chain.

public static void ValidateInheritance(GDScript targetScript, GDScript baseScript)

Parameters

targetScript GDScript

The GDScript instance to validate.

baseScript GDScript

The base GDScript class that the target script should inherit from (or any of its ancestor classes in the chain).

Exceptions

ScriptInheritanceException

Thrown if the target script does not inherit from the specified base script or any of its ancestor classes.
